title: rubus horridiformis
intro: Rubus horridiformis, also known as the thorny raspberry bush, is a species of bramble native to the mountainous regions of China. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, roots, and fruits, which have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus horridiformis include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Rubus horridiformis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
